info.description: Server for my all Goat application
info.title: Goat-Server

post.description: Remove the session token from the redis store.

get.description: Get the current account and user profile
Verify account email using the token sent during registration

post.description: Create a new chat room (direct, group, channel, or bot). The creator becomes the owner member.

patch.description: Approve or reject a pending join invitation. Only the room owner/admin can approve.

get.description: Retrieve full detail of a chat room including member list and recent messages.

post.description: Join an existing chat room. For open rooms the member is created immediately; for invite-only rooms a pending invitation is created.

patch.description: Mark the authenticated user's last-read timestamp for the given room, returning all members' statuses.

get.description: Retrieve paginated messages for a chat room. Use before_id for cursor-based pagination.

parameters.description: Return messages with ID less than this value (pagination cursor)
parameters.name: before_id

parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve all chat rooms the authenticated user belongs to, grouped by room type (direct, group, channel, bot).

post.description: try to register device id checking is id already registered

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's chat participant record

post.description: Register the authenticated user as a chat participant (idempotent: returns 409 if already registered)
Upload and replace the current user's avatar (jpeg/png/webp, max 5 MB). The image is center-cropped and resized to 256×256.

patch.description: Update the current user's display name

get.description: Get a user's public profile by ID

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
